body.title: Log all bare except/pass blocks — no silent failures
body.result: Surveyed all 28 bare except/pass blocks. Third-party ebook_drm/ excluded. Applied log_error() for forensic modules, logging.getLogger('forensic').warning() for stdlib-logging modules, and pass-with-comment for truly non-fatal forensic_logger wrapper imports. 10 files changed.
body.description: No exception should fail silently. Survey all bare except/pass in codebase, add forensic logging. #205
